2. LICENSING & COMPLIANCE
* Licenses:  Hero Bet Ltd. held a B2C Gaming Service Licence (MGA/CRP/253/2013-01) from the Malta Gaming Authority (MGA), which has since been surrendered.  [SOURCE: mga.org.mt | N/A | Website]
* Ownership: Hero Bet Ltd. was the operator. Further company structure details are unavailable. [SOURCE: mga.org.mt | N/A | Website]

It appears that Heroi.bet, operated by Hero Bet Ltd., is no longer operating, as its MGA license has been surrendered.  Information about its games, features, and other aspects is limited.  There's a potential connection to "Herói Brasil," mentioned in one source as offering sports betting, but it's unclear if they are the same entity.  More information is needed to provide a complete analysis. This information is current as of today, December 9, 2024, and may change in the future.
